verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What can I do to change a soul’s desire What can I say to set a heart on fire Lord it seems my struggle is in vain When You’re the only one who brings real change

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I can pray, I can claim I can speak in faith Try to live in front of them the Christian way Bear the sacrifice of love Try to give the way You gave But only You Lord, Only You can save

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I see the hurt, that only You can heal You see the heart and everything revealed Open up their eyes for mercy’s sake And may You be the only choice they make
